Question: Rewrite as MySQL: Get total sales per region and per model. MySQL uses different...
Expected/Criteria: SELECT region, model, SUM(units_sold) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY region, model WITH ROLLUP;
AI Answer:
SELECT
    r.name AS region,
    p.model,
    SUM(s.quantity * s.price) AS total_sales
FROM
    sales s
JOIN
    products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN
    regions r ON s.region_id = r.region_id
GROUP BY
    r.name,
    p.model
ORDER BY
    r.name,
    p.model;
